seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase.
new_constraint: Write the review entirely in uppercase.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Write the review entirely in uppercase.
response: i recently visited "THE ROASTED BEAN" and i must say, it's a gem. the ambiance is perfectly cozy, with soft jazz playing and warm lighting that makes you want to stay all afternoon. the coffee itself is phenomenal; i ordered the signature pour-over, and the beans were clearly of high quality, with a rich, complex flavor profile. their pastries are equally delicious—i tried a croissant that was flaky perfection. service was friendly and attentive, which always makes or breaks a coffee shop experience. while it's a little pricey, the quality justifies the cost. it's quickly becoming my new favorite spot in the neighborhood. highly recommended!<turn|>
final_answer: i recently visited "THE ROASTED BEAN" and i must say, it's a gem. the ambiance is perfectly cozy, with soft jazz playing and warm lighting that makes you want to stay all afternoon. the coffee itself is phenomenal; i ordered the signature pour-over, and the beans were clearly of high quality, with a rich, complex flavor profile. their pastries are equally delicious—i tried a croissant that was flaky perfection. service was friendly and attentive, which always makes or breaks a coffee shop experience. while it's a little pricey, the quality justifies the cost. it's quickly becoming my new favorite spot in the neighborhood. highly recommended!<turn|>
